translations: And We test you with [the] bad
puzzle.hint: A reminder about the temporary nature of this life and its trials.
puzzle.arabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍۢ ذَآئِقَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ ۗ وَنَبْلُوكُم بِٱلشَّرِّ وَٱلْخَيْرِ فِتْنَةًۭ ۖ وَإِلَيْنَا تُرْجَعُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.
